examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về không gian học tập. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể nói về nhà, thư viện, quán cà phê hoặc một nơi yên tĩnh nào đó. Giải thích tại sao bạn thích nơi đó (áp sáng, không khí, sự yên tĩnh). 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'conducive to learning', 'peace and quiet', 'distraction-free', 'cozy atmosphere', 'well-lit'.

band7.text: I usually study in my bedroom because it's the quietest place in my house. I have a big desk and a comfortable chair there, which helps me stay focused for a long time without getting tired.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, giải thích lý do đơn giản nhưng hiệu quả. Từ vựng ổn định.

band8.text: Most of the time, I head to the university library. I find the academic atmosphere there very motivating, and it's a great place to stay away from the distractions of home, like the TV or the fridge.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tốt ('academic atmosphere', 'distractions'). Cách diễn đạt 'head to' tự nhiên.

band9.text: I'm a regular at a local quiet café that has a wonderfully cozy atmosphere. I find that a bit of ambient noise actually helps my concentration, and the space is perfectly well-lit and conducive to long hours of deep study.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ cao ('regular', 'ambient noise', 'conducive to'). Diễn đạt mượt mà và logic.

v.example: After class, we usually head to the canteen for lunch.
The college campus has a very vibrant academic atmosphere.
I find it hard to study with the distraction of loud music.
The small bookstore has a very cozy atmosphere for reading.

v.meaning: tiếng ồn xung quanh/tiếng ồn nền
v.example: Some people find that ambient noise helps them sleep better.
A quiet environment is conducive to deep concentration.
It's important to have a well-lit workspace to avoid eye strain.

v.meaning: sự yên bình và tĩnh lặng
v.example: I went to the park because I needed some peace and quiet to think.
I try to keep my desk distraction-free when I'm working on a project.
He's a regular at the coffee shop and always orders the same thing.
I've finally set up a dedicated workspace in my new apartment.
She enjoys the solitude of her morning walks on the beach.
The view from the library window is very inspiring.
His speech gave the team the motivation they needed to win.
I feel more productive when I wake up early.
The noise from the street is breaking my concentration.
The chairs in the lecture hall are not very comfortable.
The university is very convenient to get to by bus.
The library is accessible to all students 24 hours a day.
The study room is well-furnished with desks and computers.
Keeping your room organized can help you study better.
I find it hard to focus if my desk is cluttered with papers.
The science lab is located in an isolated part of the campus.
The student union building is the main social space on campus.
I need some time away from the hustle and bustle of the city center.
We found a secluded beach where there were no Other people.
The lake was so tranquil and beautiful in the early morning.
Taking a short break and stretching is very refreshing.
The city has a very vibrant cultural scene.

v.meaning: thuận tiện cho việc đi lại
v.example: The apartment is in a commuter-friendly location near the station.
An ergonomic chair can help prevent back pain from long hours of study.
Good ventilation is important in a crowded classroom.
The library is temperature-controlled to protect the ancient books.
The café offers free high-speed internet to its customers.
I need to find a desk near a charging point for my laptop.
The new living room is much more spacious than the old one.
Her office has a very clean and minimalist design.
The student created a personalized study plan for the finals.
The building has a dedicated area for student research.
The new community center is a multifunctional space for all ages.
Public transport is now more accessible for people with disabilities.
They are building more affordable housing for young families.

v.meaning: nằm ở vị trí trung tâm
v.example: The hotel is centrally located near all the main attractions.
The restaurant is a bit out of the way, but it's well worth the trip.
The café is tucked away in a quiet alleyway.
The market is constant bustling with activity.
The mountain air is so fresh and the surroundings are serene.
I prefer an uncluttered workspace to help me think clearly.
The large painting is the focal point of the room.
The cabin in the woods is my favorite weekend retreat.
